name: The Home Loan Savings Bank
description_short: Community bank serving Coshocton County, Ohio since 1882, offering checking, savings, mortgages, and auto loans with FDIC insurance.
description_long:
The Home Loan Savings Bank is a long-established community bank headquartered in Coshocton, Ohio, with over 140 years of local banking history dating back to 1882. The bank maintains strong ties to the Coshocton County area and has expanded to serve nearby communities including West Lafayette and Mt. Vernon, Ohio.

The bank offers a comprehensive range of consumer banking services including checking and savings accounts, certificates of deposit, mortgages (including the Ohio Homebuyer Plus Program with $500 closing cost credits), auto loans, and business checking solutions. Their checking products feature rewards programs powered by BaZing, offering nationwide savings on shopping, dining, and travel. Current rates include 5.50% APY for the Ohio Homebuyer Plus Program mortgage product, 2.50% APY on Preferred Rewards Checking, and 3.85% APY on 12-month certificates. Mobile banking capabilities include check deposit via smartphone app, available 24/7.

As a traditional community bank, The Home Loan Savings Bank distinguishes itself through personalized local service and established relationships with the surrounding area. All deposits are FDIC-insured, backed by the full faith and credit of the U.S. Government. The bank maintains physical branches with extended hours including Saturday service at select locations and drive-through access.

The primary limitation is geographic reach—this is a regional bank with four branch locations concentrated in central Ohio. Customers outside the Coshocton County area will find limited branch access, though online banking provides 24/7 account management. The website content does not detail loan approval criteria, full fee schedules, or minimum balance requirements, which are important considerations for prospective customers. Many banks offer installment loans with fixed monthly payments, giving borrowers a clear payoff timeline.
services: Checking accounts with Preferred Rewards and Smart Rewards programs
Savings accounts and certificates of deposit (12-month CDs at 3.85% APY)
Mortgage lending including Ohio Homebuyer Plus Program with closing cost credits
Mobile check deposit via smartphone app
pros: FDIC-insured deposits with full government backing
142+ years of established local banking history and community presence since 1882
Ohio Homebuyer Plus Program offers $500 mortgage closing cost credits with 5.50% APY
Mobile check deposit available 24/7 via smartphone app
Multiple branch locations with extended hours including Saturday service at select offices
Rewards checking accounts with BaZing partnership providing nationwide merchant discounts
Free 24/7 online banking access for account management
cons: Limited geographic footprint—only 4 branches in central Ohio (Coshocton, West Lafayette, Mt. Vernon areas), restricting access for non-local customers
Website does not disclose minimum balance requirements, monthly fees, or complete fee schedules, requiring customers to contact bank directly for details
No mention of credit cards, investment services, or wealth management offerings available on website
best_for: Coshocton County, Ohio residents seeking personalized local banking relationships
First-time homebuyers in Ohio interested in closing cost assistance programs
Customers prioritizing established community bank stability over digital-only banking models
diagnosis: The Home Loan Savings Bank is best suited for residents of central Ohio (Coshocton, Knox, Delaware counties) seeking full-service banking with local relationship management and FDIC protection. Primary caveat: geographic limitation makes this impractical for non-local customers, and the website lacks transparency on fee structures and loan terms—direct contact required.
typical_results_timeline: Account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions vary by product.
